Narrative.As: a visitor to the historical experience
Narrative.I want: to select a historical era and see era-specific content, settings, and options
Narrative.So that: I can explore the experience in a way that matches the era I chose

Background: Given the system has historical-era views available for Ancient, Medieval, Industrial, Modern, and Future
And the user is currently on the historical era selection screen

Scenarios.Scenario: Scenario 1: Display Ancient-era content when Ancient is selected
Scenarios.Given: the user selects Ancient as the historical era
Scenarios.When: the system updates the displayed experience
Scenarios.Then: the system shall display Ancient-era content, settings, and options relevant to Ancient

Scenarios.Scenario: Scenario 2: Display Medieval-era content when Medieval is selected
Scenarios.Given: the user selects Medieval as the historical era
Scenarios.When: the system updates the displayed experience
Scenarios.Then: the system shall display Medieval-era content, settings, and options relevant to Medieval

Scenarios.Scenario: Scenario 3: Display Industrial-era content when Industrial is selected
Scenarios.Given: the user selects Industrial as the historical era
Scenarios.When: the system updates the displayed experience
Scenarios.Then: the system shall display Industrial-era content, settings, and options relevant to Industrial

Scenarios.Scenario: Scenario 4: Display Modern-era content when Modern is selected
Scenarios.Given: the user selects Modern as the historical era
Scenarios.When: the system updates the displayed experience
Scenarios.Then: the system shall display Modern-era content, settings, and options relevant to Modern

Scenarios.Scenario: Scenario 5: Display Future-era content when Future is selected
Scenarios.Given: the user selects Future as the historical era
Scenarios.When: the system updates the displayed experience
Scenarios.Then: the system shall display Future-era content, settings, and options relevant to Future

Scenarios.Scenario: Scenario 6: Preserve the current view when no historical era is selected
Scenarios.Given: the user has not selected any historical era
Scenarios.When: the system evaluates the current era selection
Scenarios.Then: the system shall preserve the current era-specific view
Scenarios.And: the system shall not make any change to the displayed content, settings, or options

Scenarios.Scenario Outline: Scenario Outline: Display the correct era-specific experience for a selected historical era
Scenarios.Given: the user selects <historical-era> as the historical era
Scenarios.And: the current experience is configured for <historical-era>
Scenarios.When: the system refreshes the displayed view
Scenarios.Then: the system shall display <historical-era>-era content, settings, and options relevant to <historical-era>

Narrative.I want: to view a chronological overview of the eras and open a selected era for more detail
Narrative.So that: I can quickly understand the timeline and learn about the eras relevant to the theme

Background: Given the user is on the era overview page
And the theme contains era overview data

Scenarios.Scenario: Scenario 1: Display available eras in chronological order
Scenarios.When: the user views the era overview
Scenarios.Then: the system displays each available era
And: each era shows its era name, time period, and key highlights
the eras are presented in sequential order from earliest to latest based on their time period

Scenarios.Scenario: Scenario 2: Open a selected era from the overview
Scenarios.Given: the user is viewing the era overview
Scenarios.When: the user selects a specific era
Scenarios.Then: the system opens the detailed overview for the selected era

Scenarios.Scenario: Scenario 3: Show an empty state when no era data is available
Scenarios.Given: no era overview data is available
Scenarios.When: the user views the era overview
Scenarios.Then: the system displays an empty-state message
Scenarios.And: the message indicates that the era overview cannot be displayed

Scenarios.Scenario Outline: Scenario Outline: Display eras in chronological order with their details
Scenarios.Given: era overview data is available for the theme
Scenarios.And: the user is viewing the era overview
Scenarios.When: the system displays the era <era-name> with time period <time-period> and key highlights <highlights>
Then: the era is shown in the overview
the era appears in the correct chronological position relative to other eras
